title: Nizam Contract-Review Verdict Schema
description: Validates the evaluator's pre-code contract-testability review verdict for a feature contract, produced during Loop 1 (Pre-Code Alignment) as .agent/qa/NNN-contract-review.json (or a revision-suffixed variant such as NNN-contract-review-revN.json). Distinct from qa_verdict.schema.json, which validates the POST-code QA pass/fail verdict; this schema validates the PRE-code review of the verification suite's own soundness (vacuous-match, false-fail, and coverage-gap hunting) before implementation begins.

review.description: The kind of review performed, e.g. 'contract-testability'.

feature.description: Id of the feature whose contract is under review.

contract_id.description: Id of the contract under review, when distinct bookkeeping from 'feature' is useful (e.g. tracking a specific revision).

revision_reviewed.description: Which contract-negotiation revision round this review evaluated (0 for the initial proposal).

issues.description: Verification-suite soundness defects found (vacuous matches, false-fails, false-passes, coverage gaps). Empty when the contract is approved with no blocking findings.

verification_index.description: Which verification entry (by array index or ordinal) the issue concerns; null if the issue is not tied to a single entry (e.g. a missing-coverage gap).

criterion.description: The acceptance criterion the flagged verification entry was supposed to prove.

evidence.description: The dry-run or fixture-based proof demonstrating the defect.

required_fix.description: The change needed to close the defect.

missing_acceptance_coverage.description: Acceptance criteria from the feature/spec that no verification entry in the contract actually covers.

unsupported_claims.description: Claims made by the contract or its scope text that are not backed by a corresponding verification entry.

observations.description: Non-blocking notes: residual edge cases judged non-blocking, intentional design asymmetries, or awareness items that do not gate approval.

approved.description: Whether the contract (at the reviewed revision) is approved to proceed to implementation.

feature.description: Id of the feature this verdict concerns, mirroring the top-level 'feature' key.

summary.description: Human-readable summary of the review's findings and disposition.
